calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Romelyn Delossantos' claim of exemption is DENIED. The monthly expenses as listed in the claim of exemption are excessive and include costs that are not necessary to support defendant's household. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, Tel. 415.551.5868, Emails: torreanom@aol.com/mtoreano@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Riverwalk Holdings, LTD.
Copy of filed declaration in support by Jay Ledford and copy of an Order deeming admissions admitted and for sanctions filed 03-23-12 were presented to the court
No appearance by Defendant Romelyn Delossantos.
Request to add Defendant's aka Romelyn Delos Santos was granted in open court.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $9437.29
Pre Judgment Interest - $2814.78
Costs - $374.50, for a Total of $12,626.57
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction And Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.

Plaintiff Riverwalk Holdings, LT's Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction And Request For Entry Of Default Judgment is OFF CALENDAR per court's motion.

Judge Pro Tem Trent Thornley, not reported.

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Request For Production Of Documents And 1st Set Of Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty Elizabeth A. MacDonald Attorney at Law, (415-922-5939) appearing for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant.

Ruling -PLAINTIFF RIVERWALK HOLDINGS, LTD's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Request For Production Of Documents And 1st Set Of Interrogatories is granted and sanctions awarded in the amount of $640.00. Party signed the stipulation to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Prevailing prepare order. Robert Kane Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-25-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
